name: Orange Snowdrops
recipeIngredient: 1/2 can (6 oz.) frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the shortening and butter with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for about 30 seconds or until softened. Add the powdered sugar and baking soda. Beat until combined. Add the egg, orange juice concentrate, and vanilla. Beat until combined. Add as much of the flour as you can using the mixer. Using a wooden spoon, stir in any remaining flour.
2. Drop dough from a rounded teaspoon about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 375°F for about 8 minutes or until edges are lightly browned. Cool on the cookie sheet for 1 minute. Remove cookies from the sheet and cool on a wire rack.
3. Frost cookies with Orange Frosting. Store in a single layer in an airtight container up to 1 day. Makes about 36.
Orange Frosting: In a small mixing bowl, stir together 1/2 of a 6-ounce can frozen orange juice concentrate (thawed) and 3 cups sifted powdered sugar until smooth.
